summary: Iteration 12 - P2 Optimizations (Database Indexing + PWA). All 21/22 backend tests passed (95%), 1 minor test script issue. All frontend pages working correctly. Database indexes applied on startup confirmed in logs. PWA manifest.json and service-worker.js accessible and functioning.

minor.issue: Test script used wrong endpoint. Correct endpoint is /api/automation/scheduled-jobs. Not an application bug.

issues: Minor hydration warning: <span> cannot be child of <tbody>. Does not break functionality.

critical_code_review_comments: Database indexing implementation is correct - indexes created on collections: reservations, guests, rooms, audit_logs, tasks, events, housekeeping, table_reservations, messages, campaigns, staff, loyalty, dynamic_pricing_rules
PWA implementation complete: manifest.json has correct metadata (name, icons, theme_color #1a1a2e, display:standalone), service-worker.js uses network-first strategy with cache fallback
Service worker registration in index.js correctly implemented

success_rate.backend: 95% (21/22 tests passed - 1 test script issue, not app bug)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (All pages accessible, login working, navigation working)

test_credentials.note: Both admin123 and kozbeyli2026 work for login

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 verified P2 optimizations: (1) Database Indexing - Confirmed 'Database indexes applied successfully' in backend logs on startup. Indexes created on reservations (check_in, check_out, room_id, guest_id, status), guests (name, phone, email), rooms (status, type), audit_logs (timestamp, user, action), tasks, events, housekeeping, table_reservations, messages, campaigns, staff, loyalty, dynamic_pricing_rules. (2) PWA - manifest.json accessible at /manifest.json with name='Kozbeyli Konagi Yonetim Sistemi', theme_color='#1a1a2e', display='standalone'. Service-worker.js accessible and uses network-first caching strategy. Service worker registration confirmed in browser console 'SW registered'. Page title changed to 'Kozbeyli Konagi'.
